# Hypotheses by platform and surface

Use this file when adapting the same idea to a specific platform or distribution surface.

| ID | Area / form | Hypothesis | Primary tactic | Best metric | First test |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|
| H226 | TikTok For You | Full-watch and skip behaviour should be treated as creative diagnostics before hashtags. | retention-first edit | avg watch, full watch, skip | same video with different first frame/hook |
| H227 | TikTok For You | Videos with native conversational openings outperform polished ad-like openings for creator-led advice. | native delivery | 3-sec hold, comments | native talking open vs polished promo open |
| H228 | TikTok For You | TikTok FYP videos should show value before asking for context. | result-first | 3-sec hold | result-first vs background-first |
| H229 | TikTok Search | Exact problem phrasing in speech, caption and overlay increases search-match potential. | keyword alignment | search traffic | aligned vs vague packaging |
| H230 | TikTok Search | Search-first TikToks should answer quickly, then deepen; feed-first TikToks can lead with tension. | search vs feed packaging | 7d/30d views | direct answer vs tension hook |
| H231 | TikTok Search | Content-gap topics from Creator Search Insights produce longer-tail views than purely trend-driven topics. | search-backed ideation | 30d views | content-gap topic vs trend-only topic |
| H232 | TikTok LIVE | Live clips retain better when edited around a complete question/answer unit. | Q/A clipping | completion | raw live excerpt vs Q/A edit |
| H233 | TikTok LIVE | Live previews convert better when they promise a specific audience outcome. | specific live promise | live clicks/follows | generic live reminder vs outcome promise |
| H234 | TikTok LIVE | Gift/comment-heavy live moments need context labels to travel as standalone clips. | context overlay | shares | raw reaction vs labelled context |
| H235 | TikTok Shop / commerce | Shop videos convert better when the problem is demonstrated before the product link appears. | problem-first commerce | product clicks | product-first vs problem-first |
| H236 | TikTok Shop / commerce | Creator proof outperforms product spec lists for low-consideration products. | use-case proof | CTR, watch time | spec list vs live demo |
| H237 | TikTok Shop / commerce | Short objection-handling videos generate more qualified clicks than hype-only demos. | objection handling | click-through, comments | hype demo vs objection demo |
| H238 | YouTube Shorts feed | First frame behaves like a moving thumbnail and should be designed before the script is finalised. | thumbnail-like first frame | chose-to-view | designed first frame vs casual frame |
| H239 | YouTube Shorts feed | Engaged views are a better scaling metric than raw Shorts views after the 2025 view-count change. | engaged-view ranking | engaged views, avg % | rank last 30 shorts by views vs engaged views |
| H240 | YouTube Shorts feed | Shorts with a series promise convert more subscribers than isolated tips. | series label | subs per view | standalone title vs series title |
| H241 | YouTube Search / evergreen | Searchable Shorts need direct titles and direct first lines more than mystery hooks. | exact-query title | search traffic | query title vs curiosity title |
| H242 | YouTube Search / evergreen | Shorts that point to a related long video increase total session value. | short-to-long bridge | related video clicks | no bridge vs related video CTA |
| H243 | YouTube Search / evergreen | Evergreen tutorials should prioritise clarity over trend audio. | clarity-first | 30d views | trend audio vs clean tutorial |
| H244 | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Long-form highlights should be cut around one complete tension/payoff loop, not arbitrary timestamps. | loop-based clipping | completion | timestamp clip vs loop clip |
| H245 | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Shorts that preview a larger unresolved question can drive long-form traffic if the payoff remains honest. | honest cliff bridge | related video clicks | complete short vs bridge short |
| H246 | YouTube long-to-short bridge | Repurposed long-form clips need new first frames; the long-form opening usually starts too slowly for Shorts. | short-native open | chose-to-view | raw clip open vs new open |
| H247 | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Replying to comments with Shorts increases perceived relevance when the question is shown visually. | comment-first answer | watch time, comments | answer-only vs comment-card first |
| H248 | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Comment-reply Shorts convert better when the answer expands into a reusable rule. | specific answer → general rule | saves, subs | specific answer only vs answer + rule |
| H249 | YouTube comments / reply Shorts | Controversial comments can power videos, but source/proof must appear early to protect trust. | proof-backed reply | comments + sentiment | reply rant vs proof-backed reply |
| H250 | Instagram Reels feed | Reels should bias toward sendability when the content has identity/social relevance. | send-target CTA | sends per reach | save CTA vs send CTA |
| H251 | Instagram Reels feed | Reels with clean visual hierarchy outperform cluttered meme-style overlays for educational content. | clean hierarchy | avg watch, saves | cluttered vs clean edit |
| H252 | Instagram Reels feed | A strong cover can improve profile-grid conversion even if feed autoplay carries initial reach. | profile-cover design | profile-to-watch rate | generic cover vs clear cover |
| H253 | Instagram Trial Reels | Trial Reels are best for cold-audience hook testing, not follower-community content. | non-follower test | Trial Reel watch/sends | trial format vs normal Reel |
| H254 | Instagram Trial Reels | Formats that win Trial Reels should be scaled only if they also fit the account promise. | fit filter | follows per reach | high-trial video with/without profile-aligned ending |
| H255 | Instagram Trial Reels | Trial Reels can reveal whether a niche idea travels beyond existing audience familiarity. | cold-audience validation | non-follower completion | current-niche video vs adjacent-niche video |
| H256 | Instagram Stories | Stories work better for relationship and conversion than cold discovery. | warm-audience CTA | replies, link taps | feed-style story vs conversational story |
| H257 | Instagram Stories | Polls before links increase link intent by creating participation momentum. | poll → link | link taps | direct link vs poll-before-link |
| H258 | Instagram Stories | Story sequences should use one idea per frame to avoid drop-off. | one-frame-one-idea | story completion | dense sequence vs sparse sequence |
| H259 | Instagram profile / pinned posts | Pinned Reels should explain the account promise, not just show the biggest viral hit. | profile conversion | profile follows | viral pin vs promise pin |
| H260 | Instagram profile / pinned posts | Covers with explicit series labels increase bingeing from profile visits. | series cover system | profile video views | aesthetic covers vs labelled covers |
| H261 | Instagram profile / pinned posts | A clear grid architecture improves follow conversion after a single viral Reel. | profile clarity | follows/profile visit | random grid vs pillar grid |
| H262 | LinkedIn native video | LinkedIn videos perform better when the hook names a professional tension, not a generic entertainment premise. | professional problem hook | watch time, comments | generic hook vs professional hook |
| H263 | LinkedIn native video | Subtitles and document-style recap frames increase saves for professional education. | caption + recap | saves | video only vs video + recap |
| H264 | LinkedIn native video | Credibility markers matter more on LinkedIn than trend aesthetics. | proof/context | profile views, follows | trend edit vs proof-led edit |
| H265 | X / Twitter video | Videos on X need standalone text copy because many starts come from the post text rather than the first frame alone. | copy + video alignment | views, reposts | vague copy vs specific copy |
| H266 | X / Twitter video | Contrarian clips drive comments/reposts but need receipts to avoid low-trust dunking. | claim + proof | reposts, sentiment | claim-only vs proof-backed claim |
| H267 | X / Twitter video | Short clips with one quote-worthy line spread better than dense tutorials. | quotable thesis | reposts | dense tutorial vs quotable clip |
| H268 | Pinterest video / idea pins | Pinterest-style videos should prioritise search intent and evergreen utility over fast trend hooks. | evergreen searchable creative | saves, outbound clicks | trend hook vs search title |
| H269 | Pinterest video / idea pins | Final checklist cards increase saves because Pinterest users often collect future-use content. | saveable final card | saves | normal ending vs checklist card |
| H270 | Pinterest video / idea pins | Vertical process visuals outperform talking-head intros for DIY/recipe/design content. | process-first visual | saves | talking intro vs process intro |
| H271 | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Stream clips travel better when edited into a narrative unit: setup, tension, payoff. | narrative clipping | completion, shares | raw clip vs story clip |
| H272 | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Creator reaction is the share trigger when the event itself is common. | reaction emphasis | shares | game event only vs reaction plus event |
| H273 | Twitch / stream ecosystem | Clips that invite viewers back to a scheduled stream need a clear next-live promise. | event CTA | live attendance | no CTA vs specific live CTA |
